## Verses (11)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Keep me safe, O God: for in you I have put my faith. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | O my soul, you have said to the Lord, You are my Lord: I have no good but you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | As for the saints who are in the earth, they are the noble in whom is all my delight. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | Their sorrows will be increased who go after another god: I will not take drink offerings from their hands, or take their names on my lips. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | The Lord is my heritage and the wine of my cup; you are the supporter of my right. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | Fair are the places marked out for me; I have a noble heritage. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | I will give praise to the Lord who has been my guide; knowledge comes to me from my thoughts in the night. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | I have put the Lord before me at all times; because he is at my right hand, I will not be moved. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | Because of this my heart is glad, and my glory is full of joy: while my flesh takes its rest in hope. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | For you will not let my soul be prisoned in the underworld; you will not let your loved one see the place of death. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | You will make clear to me the way of life; where you are joy is complete; in your right hand there are pleasures for ever and ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
